case_title: JIANYU ZHOU VS. ZIMING LIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JIANYU AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING DOES I TO V SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JIANYU AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JIANYU
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $ 50.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JIANYU

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JIANYU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 338 MUNICH STREET, STUDIO # 2 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JIANYU SERVED JUL-31-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I TO V
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, ZIMING
